commit.message:
Fix forecast backtest to anchor to most recent event in category

Previously used the selected historical comparison event date for
anchoring, which showed 2024 prices as "actuals." Now searches the
full event catalog for the most recent past event in the category
(within 60 days) to anchor the backtest. For geopolitical, this
correctly finds US-Israel Strike Iran (2026-02-28).

Admin dashboard overhaul: strip website, add features, fix bugs

Strip to admin+API only:
- Remove all public website pages, components, assets, fonts, videos
- Redirect root (/) to /admin
- Simplify layout to admin-focused wrapper

New features:
- Media library picker modal for all image upload forms
- Media folder management (create, rename, delete, move files)
- Drag-and-drop reordering for projects and services
- Form validation with character limits across all 9 forms
- Video field type in page content editor
- Revalidation webhook utility for instant website updates

Bug fixes:
- Fix stale UI after CRUD (router.refresh before navigation)
- Fix media deletion ghost entries (split cache headers, optimistic UI)
- Fix conflicting cache headers (admin no-store, public reduced TTL)

commit.message:
Fix pending_student_ids propagation, deselect removal, and pending-changes UX

Root cause fix: pending_student_ids was missing from EventRegistrationOut schema
and _build_reg_out, so saveDancersDraft received undefined and the || [] fallback
wiped out existing admin-added pending IDs, making all students appear paid.

- schemas.py: Add pending_student_ids: list[str] = [] to EventRegistrationOut
- main.py (_build_reg_out): Parse and include pending_student_ids in every
  EventRegistrationOut response so all endpoints return the field consistently
- main.py (add-students-save): Accept optional remove_student_ids /
  remove_observer_ids; only allow removing items currently tracked as pending
  (security guard prevents paid students from being user-removed); strip them
  from event_registration_students/observers and pending_student_ids
- schemas.py (EventRegistrationCreate): Add optional remove_student_ids /
  remove_observer_ids fields
- events.html (saveDancersDraft): Compute deselected pending students/observers
  and pass them as removal lists to the backend; relax the "must add something"
  guard so pure removals are also allowed
- events.html: Add regPendingChanges banner that lights up amber whenever the
  current toggle selection differs from the state when the modal was opened;
  hides automatically on save, close, or when advancing to the Stripe step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add command prefix setting for agent CLI launch (#468)

## Summary

- Adds a project-level **Command Prefix** setting that gets prepended to
the CLI command when Clubhouse launches agents
- Allows users to source environment setup scripts (e.g. `. ./init.ps1`)
before the agent binary starts, so PATH changes and environment
variables are inherited by the agent
- Closes #425

## Changes

### Core (`src/shared/types.ts`)
- Added `commandPrefix?: string` to `ProjectAgentDefaults`

### Spawn pipeline (`src/main/services/`)
- **agent-system.ts**: Reads `commandPrefix` from project defaults and
forwards it to all three spawn paths (PTY, headless, structured)
- **pty-manager.ts**: Accepts `commandPrefix` parameter; on Unix, builds
`{prefix} && exec {binary} {args}` as the pending command; on Windows,
prepends `{prefix} &` to the cmd.exe command
- **headless-manager.ts**: Accepts `commandPrefix` parameter; on Unix,
wraps via `sh -c '{prefix} && exec "$@"' _ {binary} {args}` to preserve
argument quoting; on Windows, prepends to the cmd.exe command line

### Structured adapters (`src/main/orchestrators/`)
- **types.ts**: Added `commandPrefix` to `StructuredSessionOpts`
- **stream-json-adapter.ts**: Wraps spawn via `sh -c` when prefix is set
- **acp-adapter.ts**: Adjusts binary/args passed to `AcpClient` when
prefix is set

### UI (`src/renderer/`)
- **ProjectAgentDefaultsSection.tsx**: Added Command Prefix input field
with helpful description, positioned above build/test/lint commands
- **preload/index.ts**: Added `commandPrefix` to the IPC bridge type
signatures

### Tests
- PTY manager: prefix prepended to pending command (Unix + Windows), no
change when undefined
- Headless manager: shell wrapper on Unix, cmd.exe prefix on Windows,
direct spawn without prefix
- Agent system: commandPrefix forwarded from project settings, undefined
when not configured
- Stream-json adapter: shell wrapper when prefix is set, direct spawn
without
- Settings UI: field renders, loads, saves, marks dirty, omits when
empty
- Headless integration: updated existing assertions for new parameter

## Test Plan
- [x] Type check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [x] All 5392 tests pass (`npm test`)
- [x] No new lint errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Manual: Set a command prefix in project settings, spawn a durable
agent, verify the prefix runs before the CLI binary
- [ ] Manual: Verify agents spawn normally when no prefix is configured
(regression)
- [ ] Manual: Verify headless/quick agents also pick up the prefix

## Manual Validation

1. Open a project in Clubhouse, go to Settings → Default Agent Settings
2. Enter a command prefix like `echo PREFIX_RAN &&` in the Command
Prefix field
3. Save and spawn an agent — the PTY output should show "PREFIX_RAN"
before the agent starts
4. Clear the prefix, save, and spawn again — agent should start normally
without any prefix

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Deploy: restore /100 divisor for Support_Split__c (stored as 0-100, not 0-1)

Previous commit accidentally removed /100 causing ownerSplit = 1-50 = -49,
producing wildly negative demand for Holly and inflated demand for Terri.
Restored /100 in all three split calculations while keeping Math.max(0) clamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move share card to finale, completion triggers after content

Slide order: content → poll → discussion → share card (finale).
Completion registers when user passes last content slide, not at share card.
Users who read content and X out at the poll still get credit.
Share card is the natural ending — no awkward slides after the finish line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add autoPlay to hero video for mobile browser compatibility

Mobile browsers (iOS Safari, Android Chrome) require autoPlay+muted+playsInline
to buffer the video and allow JS seeking. The canplay handler immediately pauses
it at frame 0 so users never see it autoplay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add adminAPI: deleteUser, deleteUsers, grantDotori

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Session 161: Promote 10 raw_data fields to structured columns in staging_games

Layer 1 optimization — stop burying pipeline-critical data in JSONB.
Every nightly run, FPS/DQE parsed raw_data on all 188K rows to extract
the same 10 fields. Now they're proper indexed columns.

New columns: home_team_source_id, away_team_source_id, gender, age_group,
event_state, home_birth_year, away_birth_year, home_club, away_club, subdivision.
Backfilled 188,031 rows. Partial indexes on source IDs for SEM joins.
All consumers read structured columns first with raw_data fallback.

commit.message:
fix(ci): init required Core submodules before smoke build; fix pipefail

xcodebuild resolves ALL XCLocalSwiftPackageReference entries in the
workspace regardless of scheme. Four Core dirs (4DO, Bliss, CrabEMU,
VirtualJaguar) are top-level git submodules and are empty on CI when
submodules:false is set. Shallow-init just those four before building.

Also fix the pipe swallowing xcodebuild's exit code: set pipefail
explicitly and use PIPESTATUS[0] to propagate the real exit code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: add per-step timing metrics to run creation flow (#3795)

* perf: add per-step timing metrics to run creation flow

break down the coarse api_to_executor metric (avg 4,036ms) into 6
fine-grained steps: authorize, transaction, token, build_context,
prepare, and dispatch. each executor now returns sandboxType in
ExecutorResult so metrics are accurately attributed.

commit.message:
Deploy: clamp negative onTimeWeeklyPace to 0 in demand calculation

Projects with a negative On_Time_Weekly_Pace__c (e.g. overdue/behind projects)
were subtracting from person demand totals. The project table already showed
these as '—', so demand now clamps to Math.max(0, pace) to match.

commit.message:
feat: v2.1.2 — major refactor with 63 validators, React hook, i18n and cross-framework engine

## Architecture refactor
- Replaced `ValidationManager` with the new `ValiValid<T>` class (src/validation/ValiValid.ts)
- Separated sync and async rule maps (_syncRules / _asyncRules) for granular control
- Replaced monolithic `FormTypes.ts` and `Constants.ts` with modular index files
  (src/types/index.ts, src/constants/index.ts)

## New: React hook
- Added `useValiValid<T>()` hook (src/hooks/useValiValid.ts)
- Options: initial, validations, validateOnBlur
- Returns: form, errors, isValid, isValidating, touchedFields, dirtyFields,
  handleChange, handleBlur, validate, reset, addFieldValidation,
  removeFieldValidation, setFieldValidations, clearFieldValidations

## New: i18n
- Added en/es locale files (src/i18n/en.ts, src/i18n/es.ts)
- setLocale() / getLocale() API for runtime locale switching

## New validators (v2.1) — +27 validators (63 total)
Numeric: GreaterThan, LessThan, Precision
Date: DateAfter, DateBefore
Enum/set: OneOf
Cross-field: NotMatchField, RequiredUnless
Array: ArrayMinLength, ArrayMaxLength, ArrayUnique, ArrayContains
Format: Time, NoHTML, Base64
Finance/Geo: IBAN, PostalCode, Latitude, Longitude
Identity: SemVer
String (extended): ExactLength, NoWhitespace, Contains, StartsWith, EndsWith,
  Slug, PasswordStrength, HexColor, IPv4, UUID, Json, Phone, CreditCard
File (extended): ImageAspectRatio, ImageMinDimensions, ImageMaxDimensions
Async: AsyncPattern

## Dynamic rule management
- addFieldValidation / removeFieldValidation / setFieldValidations / clearFieldValidations
  available on both ValiValid engine and useValiValid hook

## Public API (src/index.ts)
- Exports: useValiValid, ValiValid, setLocale, getLocale, ValidationType,
  TypeFile, FileSize, DateFormat, DateFormatExpressions + all config types

## Docs and examples
- Added docs/ with full markdown documentation in English and Spanish
- Added examples/ with 7 real-world usage examples (login, register, async,
  file upload, multistep, dynamic rules, standalone engine)
- Added CLAUDE.md with architecture guidance for AI-assisted development

## Build output
- Updated dist/ to reflect all new modules and removed legacy files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: Vali-Valid
repository.description: This code defines a form validation utility for ReactJS using TypeScript. The utility provides a way to add validation rules to form fields, validate the entire form, and handle changes to form fields.

commit.message:
feat: add admin endpoint to reset CRAWL-* enrichment attempts

Obituary records were stuck at max enrichment_attempts from previous
failed runs before the deceased-search pipeline existed. This endpoint
resets the attempt counter and lead priority so the batch processor
re-processes them through the new PropertyRadar deceased owner search.

feat: extend shared auth to events page + fix iOS magic link redirect (#307)

- Replace inline email-only auth with shared ctrl-auth.js module
- Adds Google OAuth + username gate via ctrl-auth
- Remove old auth HTML/CSS/JS (modal, buttons, handlers)
- Add ctrl-auth-root mount point and event listeners
- Fast session restore on page load

Boards iOS:
- Fix magic link emailRedirectTo to use URL scheme (ctrlrodeo://auth-callback)
  instead of web URL, so magic links open the app directly
